articles.title: New Hampshire’s tiny Seacoast is a beachy tax haven for Massachusetts buyers
articles.description:
Unlike in the Cape or the Berkshires, most Seacoast home buyers aren’t here for a vacation getaway.

The post New Hampshire’s tiny Seacoast is a beachy tax haven for Massachusetts buyers appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts buyers are increasingly purchasing homes in New Hampshire's Seacoast for tax benefits.
Seacoast offers lower property taxes compared to Cape Cod and the Berkshires.
This trend may drive up housing demand and prices in the Seacoast region.

articles.title: Amtrak warns customers that trains may experience delays this week due to ‘extreme temperatures’
articles.description:
Boston temperatures are in the 90s this week.

The post Amtrak warns customers that trains may experience delays this week due to ‘extreme temperatures’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Amtrak warns of potential train delays this week in Boston due to extreme temperatures.
Boston temperatures are expected to reach the 90s, affecting train schedules.
Travelers should anticipate disruptions and plan accordingly for their journeys.

articles.title: Trump says ICE should continue traffic stops after recent shootings, seeming to contradict new policy
articles.description:
The president wrote early Wednesday on his social media site that ICE is “doing a GREAT job, one that has to be done.”

The post Trump says ICE should continue traffic stops after recent shootings, seeming to contradict new policy appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump supports ICE's traffic stops despite new policy changes announced recently.
ICE's role in traffic enforcement may affect local communities following recent shootings.
Boston residents could see increased ICE presence during traffic stops as a result.

articles.title: Elin Hilderbrand talks ‘The Five-Star Weekend,’ Nantucket, and her next book
articles.description:
The bestselling author talks about seeing her novel come to life on Peacock, why filming on Nantucket mattered, Chloë Sevigny and D'Arcy Carden's performances, and the book she's writing in retirement.

The post Elin Hilderbrand talks ‘The Five-Star Weekend,’ Nantucket, and her next book appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Elin Hilderbrand's novel 'The Five-Star Weekend' is adapted into a Peacock series.
Chloë Sevigny and D'Arcy Carden star in the adaptation filmed on Nantucket.
Hilderbrand plans to write another book during her retirement, impacting local literary culture.

articles.title: Cease, bullpen combine on 3-hitter in AL’s 4-0 win, first All-Star shutout since 2013
articles.description:
“The pitching was just dominant today."

The post Cease, bullpen combine on 3-hitter in AL’s 4-0 win, first All-Star shutout since 2013 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: American League secured a 4-0 victory in the All-Star Game on July 15, 2026.
Pitcher Dylan Cease led the team, contributing to the first All-Star shutout since 2013.
Boston fans witnessed a dominant performance, highlighting the strength of AL pitchers.

articles.title: Messi vs Bellingham could be the story of the World Cup semifinal between England and Argentina
articles.description:
“It’s just incredible his campaign, this tournament, how he carries that team it’s just, absolutely incredible,” England coach Thomas Tuchel said of Messi.

The post Messi vs Bellingham could be the story of the World Cup semifinal between England and Argentina appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Messi leads Argentina into World Cup semifinal against England on July 14.
England coach Thomas Tuchel praises Messi's incredible performance this tournament.
Boston residents can expect heightened local interest in the match due to Messi's star power.
